top3.sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' ESCAPE '!'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE LOWER(m.label) LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' ESCAPE '!'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1;

SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;

final.sql:
SELECT m.label
FROM molecule m
JOIN atom a ON m.molecule_id = a.molecule_id
WHERE m.label LIKE '%carcinogenic%' OR m.label LIKE '%Carcinogenic%'
GROUP BY m.molecule_id, m.label
ORDER BY COUNT(a.atom_id) DESC
LIMIT 1;
